title: Senior Teacher - Navneet Education Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Navneet Education Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Navneet Education Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Navneet Education Ventures Solutions:
Navneet Education Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education Ventures Solutions!
